title: abutilon sinense
intro: Abutilon sinense is a species of plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the Chinese bellflower or velvet leaf. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Abutilon sinense include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Abutilon sinense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory and digestive problems.
